fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the employee for whom the confidential information is registered.
The program automatically fills in the field from the No. field on the employee card.

fields.name: Confidential Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to define the type of confidential information.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: When you register confidential information for an employee, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the different confidential information for the employee in the Confidential Information table. The line number is specific to the particular confidential information.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the confidential information.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment is associated with the entry.
